title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As we conclude the workweek and head into the weekend, take a moment to review the key articles from this week, including those you've highlighted. The dry bulk market enters a more cautious phase , Grain dry bulk flows to China , Small impact on VLCCs from OPEC+ production cuts phase-out delay and more. Capesize Rally Fizzles Out as Iron Ore Prices Drop - Capesize rates eased after hitting two-month highs , as lower iron ore prices combined with recent soft Chinese economic data weighed on sentiment.
